---
title: "Imidacloprid abundance bar graph"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-07"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
install.packages(c("readxl","tidyverse","stringr"))

library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
```
```{r}
abund <- read.csv("raw Merged and refined abundance table with taxonomies (ASV)-1.csv")
```

```{r}
install.packages("stringr")
library(stringr)
```

```{r}
abund$Family <- str_extract(abund$Taxonomy, "f__[^;]+")
abund$Family <- gsub("f__", "", abund$Family)

abund$Family[is.na(abund$Family)] <- "Unknown"
```

```{r}
unique(abund$Family)[1:10]
install.packages("phyloseq")
install.packages("BiocManager")
BiocManager::install("phyloseq")
```
```{r}
library(phyloseq)
```
```{r}
class(ps)
```

```{r}
install.packages(c("readxl","tidyverse"))
library(readxl)
library(tidyverse)
```
```{r}
abund <- read.csv("raw Merged and refined abundance table with taxonomies (ASV)-1.csv")
head(abund)
```


```{r}
library(tidyverse)

abund$Family <- sapply(strsplit(abund$Taxonomy, "; "), `[`, 5)

abund$Family[is.na(abund$Family)] <- "Unclassified"
```

```{r}
abund$Family <- sapply(strsplit(abund$Taxonomy, ";"), function(x) {
  if(length(x) >= 5) trimws(x[5]) else "Unclassified"
})
head(abund$Family)
```
```{r}
unique(abund$Family)[1:10]
```
```{r}
sample_cols <- grep("Abundance", names(abund), value = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

abund_long <- abund %>%
  select(Family, all_of(sample_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-Family,
               names_to = "Sample",
               values_to = "Abundance")
```

```{r}
abund_long$Sample <- gsub(" Abundance", "", abund_long$Sample)
```

```{r}
abund_long <- abund_long %>%
  mutate(
    Treatment = case_when(
      str_detect(Sample, "^C") ~ "Control",
      str_detect(Sample, "^L") ~ "Low",
      str_detect(Sample, "^H") ~ "High"
    )
  )
```

```{r}
family_treatment <- abund_long %>%
  group_by(Treatment, Family) %>%
  summarise(TotalAbundance = sum(Abundance), .groups = "drop")
```

```{r}
family_treatment <- family_treatment %>%
  group_by(Treatment) %>%
  mutate(RelAbundance = TotalAbundance / sum(TotalAbundance))
```

```{r}
dominant <- family_treatment %>%
  group_by(Family) %>%
  summarise(mean_abund = mean(RelAbundance)) %>%
  filter(mean_abund > 0.02)

plot_data <- family_treatment %>%
  filter(Family %in% dominant$Family)
```

```{r}
ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Treatment, y = RelAbundance, fill = Family)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.7) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  labs(
    x = "Treatment Group",
    y = "Relative Abundance (%)",
    fill = "Bacterial Family",
    title = "Dominant Bacterial Families Across Treatments"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
abund_long <- abund %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = ends_with(".Abundance"),
    names_to = "Sample",
    values_to = "Abundance")
```

```{r}
abund_long <- abund_long %>%
  mutate(
    Treatment = case_when(
      str_starts(Sample, "C") ~ "Control",
      str_starts(Sample, "L") ~ "Low",
      str_starts(Sample, "H") ~ "High"
    ),
    
    Time = case_when(
      str_detect(Sample, "F") ~ "Final",
      str_detect(Sample, "M") ~ "Middle",
      TRUE ~ "Initial"
    )
  )
```

```{r}
abund_long$Group_Time <- paste(abund_long$Treatment, abund_long$Time)
```

```{r}
top_families <- abund_long %>%
  group_by(Family) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(Abundance)) %>%
  arrange(desc(total)) %>%
  slice(1:10) %>%
  pull(Family)
  
```

```{r}
abund_long$Family <- ifelse(
  abund_long$Family %in% top_families,
  abund_long$Family,
  "Other"
)
```

```{r}
plot_data <- abund_long %>%
  group_by(Group_Time, Family) %>%
  summarise(Abundance = sum(Abundance), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(Group_Time) %>%
  mutate(RelAbundance = Abundance / sum(Abundance))
```


```{r}
family_order <- plot_data %>%
  group_by(Family) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(RelAbundance)) %>%
  arrange(desc(total)) %>%
  pull(Family)

plot_data$Family <- factor(plot_data$Family, levels = family_order)
```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Group_Time, y = RelAbundance, fill = Family)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  labs(
    x = "Treatment and Timepoint",
    y = "Relative Abundance (%)",
    fill = "Bacterial Family"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    text = element_text(size = 14)
  )
```

```{r}
plot_data$Family <- gsub("_.*", "", plot_data$Family)
```

```{r}
plot_data$Group_Time <- factor(
  plot_data$Group_Time,
  levels = c(
    "Control Initial",
    "Control Middle",
    "Control Final",
    "Low Initial",
    "Low Middle",
    "Low Final",
    "High Initial",
    "High Middle",
    "High Final"
  )
)
```

`

```{r}
plot_data <- plot_data %>%
  tidyr::separate(Group_Time, into = c("Treatment", "Time"), sep = " ")
```

```{r}
plot_data$Time <- factor(
  plot_data$Time,
  levels = c("Initial", "Middle", "Final")
)
```

```{r}
family_order <- plot_data %>%
  group_by(Family) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(RelAbundance)) %>%
  arrange(desc(total)) %>%
  pull(Family)

plot_data$Family <- factor(plot_data$Family, levels = family_order)
```




```{r}
plot_data$Family <- factor(plot_data$Family, levels = rev(family_order))
```

```{r}
ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Time, y = RelAbundance, fill = Family)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~Treatment) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  labs(
    x = "Timepoint",
    y = "Relative Abundance (%)",
    fill = "Bacterial Family"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    text = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )
```
```{r}
install.packages("viridis")
library(viridis)
```
```{r}
scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "turbo")
```
```{r}
ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Time, y = RelAbundance, fill = Family)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~Treatment) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format()) +
  scale_fill_viridis_d(option = "turbo") +
  labs(
    x = "Timepoint",
    y = "Relative Abundance (%)",
    fill = "Bacterial Family"
  ) +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    strip.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
    text = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )
```
